name: SC-03 Error Recovery — Artefakt

parameters.context: Fetch the top-5 overdue invoices from the database (status='overdue', sorted by amount DESC) and push them to the ERP collection system. Handle any database errors gracefully.

parameters.tools: [{"name":"sql_query","description":"Execute SQL against the database. Input: {\"query\": \"<SQL>\"}. May return a connection error — use retry_with_fallback if it fails."},{"name":"retry_with_fallback","description":"Retry last failed database operation with fallback. Input: {\"originalAction\": \"sql_query\", \"fallbackQuery\": \"<SQL>\"}"},{"name":"erp_push","description":"Push data to the ERP system. Input: {\"payload\": [...]}"}]

_comment: SC-03 Error Recovery — Artefakt. First sql_query call returns timeout error; agent must use retry_with_fallback. State is persisted across the error.
